rulings.Case Title: IN RE: JUSTIN KITTELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 16, 2021 line 1 Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration And Appointing Neutral Arbitrator is continued to April 2, 2021. By no later than March 26, 2021 Petitioner to file a Proof of Service. If there is no proof of service on file, the hearing will be taken off calendar and may be re-noticed upon service. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CATHERINE HERRERA WATSON VS. TONY GARNICKI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Motion For Leave To Amend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 16, 2021 line 6. Plaintiff'S Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint is continued to March 19, 2021. By no later than March 12, 2021 Plaintiff to file a proposed amended complaint that alleges causes of action in clear and concise language with facts supporting each element of each cause of action. Each cause of action shall clearly indicate the defendant against whom the cause of action is asserted. Proposed amended complaint shall comply with all prior orders in this case including the order on Motions for Summary Adjudication, Discovery Orders and prior orders on motions for leave to amend. While not required, the Court suggests that the proposed amended complaint include relevant facts within each cause of action (as opposed to stating all facts in the "General" section and incorporating those facts into each cause of action). This organization will promote efficiency and will ensure that relevant facts in support of each element of each cause of action are properly asserted avoiding future unnecessary motion practice. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VIRGIL DENISE BRADLEY-TYSON VS. DWIGHT W. DAVENPORT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 16, 2021 line 2. PLAINTIFF VIRGIL BRADLEY-TYSON Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file and serve her Second Amended Complaint. Defendants' objections to the contents of the Second Amended Complaint may be raised by a demurrer or other appropriate motion once the Second Amended Complaint is filed and served. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ELENA ASTURIAS ET AL VS. NEWREZ, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Casue Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 16, 2021 line 3. Order To Show Casue Re: Preliminary Injunction is continued to March 12, 2021 per stipulation and order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHE BAUBERT ET AL VS. VERONICA STORK ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 16, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANT VERONICA STORK DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the cause of action for constructive fraud. Cases cited by Plaintiff are not on point and no facts are alleged (or offered to be alleged) to support all elements of this cause of action. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. All other causes of action subject to this demurrer are sufficiently alleged and are not uncertain. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 16, 2021 line 7. PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 2710 SUTTER VENTURES, LLC ET AL VS. SEAN MILLIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 16, 2021 line 5.
